creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
My ThinkPad T430 has always worked flawlessly with suspend/resume.

Since upgrading from 13.2-RELEASE to 13.3-BETA3 today, the system freezes solid after "uhub2 detached" while trying to suspend.  No response to keyboard or mouse input, or power button.

I have to hold the power button down to force shutdown.
